# PRD-003: Analytics dashboard

## Problem

Operators have no visibility into per-tenant usage.

## Goal

Show daily activity, seat count, and API usage in one dashboard.

## Requirements

- PRD-REQ-005: Show tenant usage for the last 30 days.
- PRD-REQ-006: Export usage rows as CSV.
